tips_en: Start with the IG-Bench/IdeaGene paper (Paper 3) — its novel 'idea genome' framework and the striking finding that even the best system reaches only 27.3% accuracy make it the most conceptually rich and thought-provoking read. All three papers share a unifying theme: revealing significant capability gaps in current AI through rigorous benchmarking, with Papers 1 and 3 both showing that multi-turn interaction and lineage-grounded reasoning remain unsolved frontiers (sub-50% and sub-30% respectively). Read UniClawBench second if you're focused on agent deployment, and LingBot-Video if embodied AI/video generation is your interest.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读第三篇论文（IG-Bench/IdeaGene）——其新颖的"想法基因组"框架以及即使最佳系统准确率也仅27.3%的惊人发现，使其成为三篇中概念最丰富、最引人深思的论文。三篇论文共享一个共同主题：通过严格的基准测试揭示当前AI的显著能力差距，第一篇和第三篇都表明多轮交互和基于谱系的推理仍是未解决的难题（准确率分别低于50%和30%）。如果您关注智能体部署，可接着阅读第一篇UniClawBench；若对具身AI/视频生成感兴趣，则可阅读第二篇LingBot-Video。
